_meta: Tier 0a positive-enriched hand labels. Labelled before classifier was run on this set. Labelling rule: C1/C2/C3/C4 if the construction is structurally present per PRD §1 examples; 'none' if it's a different rhetorical pattern (e.g., plain negation, 'Y, not X' reversed-order contrast, 'X but Y' coordination).
